response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: Talk segment manually transcribed; song segment phonetically matches JSON lyrics perfectly. 2. JSON Usage: Reference JSON used for song lyrics; talk segment manually transcribed and translated. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles tightly anchored to vocal starts; visual text for song title included; talk segment paced to conversational flow.

subtitles.original: そうなんですけど、なんか...
subtitles.english: That's true, but somehow...

subtitles.original: トコさんが一言放ったんですよ
subtitles.english: Toko-san said something.

subtitles.original: 「芋だ！」
subtitles.english: "It's potatoes!"

subtitles.original: お芋が大好きなんです、私
subtitles.english: I really love potatoes.

subtitles.original: 芋？ お芋めっちゃ好きなんですよ
subtitles.english: Potatoes? I really like potatoes.

subtitles.original: カレーなのにお芋？
subtitles.english: Even though it's curry, you want potatoes?

subtitles.original: お芋が好きやから
subtitles.english: Because I like potatoes.

subtitles.original: 芋好きなんだって思って、芋があるお弁当だったから
subtitles.english: I thought, "You like potatoes," and since it was a bento with potatoes...

subtitles.original: ああ、よかったと思って、じゃあちょっと芋一番大きいの選びますねって言って
subtitles.english: "Oh, good," I thought. So I said, "I'll pick the biggest potato for you."

subtitles.original: 奏チョイスでね
subtitles.english: Kanade's choice.

subtitles.original: 選んで、別にそれをこうあげようとしたわけじゃないんですけど
subtitles.english: I picked it, not that I was necessarily going to give it to her...

subtitles.original: トコさんが採用してくださって
subtitles.english: ...but Toko-san accepted it.

subtitles.original: いや、それはするでしょ
subtitles.english: Well, of course I would.

subtitles.original: そんなだだってせっかくこれ一番お芋大きいですって選んでくれたら
subtitles.english: Since you went to the trouble of picking the biggest one for me...

subtitles.original: 「じゃあこれ！」って
subtitles.english: ...I'm like, "Then I'll take this one!"

subtitles.original: 「かしこまりました」って
subtitles.english: "Certainly," I said.

subtitles.original: めちゃくちゃ嬉しかったです、あれ
subtitles.english: I was so happy about that.

subtitles.original: なんか色んな味あったんですけど、お芋の大きさだけで選んでましたよね
subtitles.english: There were various flavors, but I was choosing just by the size of the potato.

subtitles.original: 違うよ、奏が選んでくれたから持っていったんよ、私は
subtitles.english: No, it's because Kanade picked it for me that I took it.

subtitles.original: 感動しました
subtitles.english: I was so moved.

subtitles.original: あ、そうなんですか？
subtitles.english: Oh, really?

subtitles.original: 大好き！
subtitles.english: I love you!

subtitles.original: ちょっとよかったら、あの、今後とも何か機会があったら
subtitles.english: If you'd like, if there's any opportunity in the future...

subtitles.original: もちろん！
subtitles.english: Of course!

subtitles.original: なんか一緒にやりましょう
subtitles.english: ...let's do something together.

subtitles.original: いくらでもやろう、一緒に
subtitles.english: Let's do as much as you want, together.

subtitles.original: 本当ですか？ ユニットも組みますか？
subtitles.english: Really? Shall we form a unit?

subtitles.original: もうなんでもやろう、全部やろう
subtitles.english: Let's do anything, let's do it all.

subtitles.original: 本当ですか？ よっしゃ！ ユニット名、カルニェで
subtitles.english: Really? Yes! The unit name will be 'Karunie'...

subtitles.original: ちょっと被るか... ちょっと被るか
subtitles.english: ...it's a bit similar. It's a bit similar.

subtitles.original: っていうのは冗談で、なんか一緒にできたら嬉しいです
subtitles.english: Just kidding, but I'd be happy to do something together.

subtitles.original: トコさん、ありがとうございました
subtitles.english: Toko-san, thank you very much.

subtitles.original: またね！
subtitles.english: See you!

subtitles.original: バイバイ！
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: ということでですね、次がゲストは最後になります
subtitles.english: And so, the next guest will be the last.

subtitles.original: 最後はあの人って、みんなわかるよね？
subtitles.english: The last guest is that person... you all know who it is, right?

subtitles.original: 楽しみにしててくださーい！
subtitles.english: Please look forward to it!

subtitles.original: それでは、次の曲行きます
subtitles.english: Now, let's go to the next song.

subtitles.original:
浪漫と算盤
作詞・作曲: 椎名林檎
subtitles.english: [Title: Roman to Soroban / Lyrics & Music: Shiina Ringo]

subtitles.original: 主義を以って利益を成した場合は
subtitles.english: If you make a profit through a principle

subtitles.original: 商いが食い扶持以上の意味を宿す
subtitles.english: Business means something more than a means of earning a livelihood

subtitles.original: 義務と権利双方重んじつつ飽く迄
subtitles.english: Considering duties and rights important, but I don't want to give priority to either of them

subtitles.original: 両者割合は有耶無耶にしていたい
subtitles.english: I'd like to keep the ratio of the two ambiguous

subtitles.original: 玄人衆素人衆皆の衆賛否両論頂戴
subtitles.english: Pros and amateurs alike, please give me your opinions

subtitles.original: 置きに行こうなんぞ野暮
subtitles.english: It's tasteless to play it safe

subtitles.original: 新しい技毎度練り出したいです
subtitles.english: I want to try something new on every occasion

subtitles.original: 苦しくとも僕には判っている
subtitles.english: Even if it's painful, I know...

subtitles.original: 貴方も同じ様にひとり生きている
subtitles.english: ...that you live alone just the same as I do.

subtitles.original: 宇宙を因数分解したとこで自由と
subtitles.english: Even if you factorize the universe...

subtitles.original: 孤独だけが待っているんでしょう
subtitles.english: ...only freedom and loneliness are waiting, aren't they?

subtitles.original: 玄人で素人で労働者で生活者の侭
subtitles.english: As a pro, an amateur, a worker, and a liver...

subtitles.original: 面白可笑しく居させて
subtitles.english: ...let me stay here happily and funnily.

subtitles.original: 煩わしい役毎度請け負いたいです
subtitles.english: I want to take on annoying roles every time.

subtitles.original: 虚しくとも
subtitles.english: Even if it's empty...

subtitles.original: 貴方を思うたび
subtitles.english: ...whenever I think of you,

subtitles.original: 僕は赦されていく
subtitles.english: I am forgiven.

subtitles.original: 夢と現を結わえて
subtitles.english: Tying together dreams and reality.
